title: Errors, Cleanup, and Root-Cause Debugging · Runtime Trace: Custom Errors
summary: Diagnose malformed records and failed operations while keeping cleanup, user recovery, and causal evidence intact. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js custom errors increment in a recoverable import and diagnostics workflow. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Create domain error types only when callers need stable programmatic distinctions and recovery actions.
Place try, catch, and finally around the smallest recoverable boundary without swallowing failures or overriding control flow.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
